metadata.title: Supplement Intelligence — Comprehensive Product Database
metadata.description: Machine-readable research database for all 28 Vital Health Global supplement products. Includes active ingredients, PubMed citations, evidence grades, clinical applications, safety profiles, and dosing guidelines.
metadata.methodology: All clinical claims are supported by peer-reviewed research indexed in PubMed. Evidence grades follow GRADE methodology: A (strong, multiple RCTs), B (moderate, limited RCTs or systematic reviews), C (preliminary, observational studies).
metadata.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not medical advice. Consult a qualified healthcare provider before starting any supplement regimen.

products.name: V-NEUROKAFE
products.tagline: Nootropic mushroom coffee for sustained focus and mental clarity

key_ingredients.name: Lion's Mane Mushroom (Hericium erinaceus)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Stimulates Nerve Growth Factor (NGF) synthesis; promotes neuroplasticity and myelination

key_ingredients.name: L-Theanine
key_ingredients.mechanism: Increases alpha brain wave activity; modulates GABA and dopamine; synergistic with caffeine

key_ingredients.name: Bacopa Monnieri
key_ingredients.mechanism: Inhibits acetylcholinesterase; enhances synaptic transmission; antioxidant neuroprotection

key_ingredients.name: Arabica Coffee (Coffea arabica)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Adenosine receptor antagonism; dopamine potentiation; cognitive alertness

products.safety_profile: Well-tolerated; avoid in pregnancy; caffeine-sensitive individuals should start with half serving
products.dosing: 1 sachet (15g) in 200ml hot water daily, preferably morning

products.name: V-LOVKAFE
products.tagline: Adaptogen-infused botanical coffee for libido, mood, and vitality

key_ingredients.name: Maca Root (Lepidium meyenii)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Modulates hypothalamic-pituitary axis; improves sexual function and energy

key_ingredients.name: Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Cortisol reduction; HPA axis modulation; testosterone support

key_ingredients.name: Tribulus Terrestris
key_ingredients.mechanism: Saponin-mediated LH stimulation; androgen receptor sensitization

products.safety_profile: Generally well-tolerated; not recommended during pregnancy or with hormone-sensitive conditions

products.name: V-THERMOKAFE
products.tagline: Thermogenic coffee blend for metabolism, fat oxidation, and energy

key_ingredients.name: Green Coffee Bean Extract
key_ingredients.mechanism: Chlorogenic acid inhibits glucose absorption; increases fat oxidation

key_ingredients.name: Garcinia Cambogia (HCA)
key_ingredients.mechanism: ATP-citrate lyase inhibition; reduces de novo lipogenesis; appetite suppression

key_ingredients.name: Green Tea Extract (EGCG)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Catechin-mediated thermogenesis; norepinephrine potentiation

products.safety_profile: Contains caffeine; avoid in cardiovascular conditions; not for use under 18

products.name: LATTEKAFFE
products.tagline: Functional latte blend for daily wellness, calm energy, and gut health

key_ingredients.name: Arabica Coffee
key_ingredients.mechanism: Adenosine antagonism; alertness and mood enhancement

key_ingredients.name: Collagen Peptides
key_ingredients.mechanism: Gut lining support; skin elasticity; joint lubrication

key_ingredients.name: Inulin (Prebiotic Fiber)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Bifidogenic effect; SCFA production; gut microbiome diversity

products.safety_profile: Well-tolerated; suitable for daily use
products.dosing: 1 sachet in 200ml hot water or milk daily

products.name: V-NRGY
products.tagline: Clean energy blend with B-vitamins and adaptogens for sustained performance

key_ingredients.name: Vitamin B12 (Methylcobalamin)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Mitochondrial energy production; red blood cell formation; neurological function

key_ingredients.name: Rhodiola Rosea
key_ingredients.mechanism: HPA axis modulation; fatigue resistance; cognitive performance under stress

key_ingredients.name: CoQ10 (Ubiquinol)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Electron transport chain support; mitochondrial ATP synthesis

products.safety_profile: Well-tolerated; CoQ10 may interact with blood thinners

products.name: PERFORMANCE+
products.tagline: Science-backed athletic performance and recovery formula

key_ingredients.name: Creatine Monohydrate
key_ingredients.mechanism: PCr resynthesis; ATP availability; muscle power output

key_ingredients.name: Beta-Alanine
key_ingredients.mechanism: Carnosine synthesis; intramuscular pH buffering; endurance

key_ingredients.name: L-Citrulline
key_ingredients.mechanism: Nitric oxide precursor; vasodilation; reduced exercise fatigue

products.safety_profile: Well-tolerated; beta-alanine may cause harmless tingling (paresthesia)
products.dosing: As directed; typically 1 serving 30 minutes before exercise

products.name: V-TEDETOX
products.tagline: Herbal detox tea blend for liver support, digestion, and cellular cleansing

key_ingredients.name: Dandelion Root (Taraxacum officinale)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Choleretic effect; bile production stimulation; liver enzyme normalization

key_ingredients.name: Milk Thistle (Silymarin)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Hepatoprotective; antioxidant; liver cell membrane stabilization

products.name: V-ORGANEX
products.tagline: Comprehensive organ cleanse formula targeting liver, kidney, and lymphatic health

products.safety_profile: NAC is well-studied and safe; avoid high doses in kidney disease

products.name: V-GLUTATION
products.tagline: The master antioxidant — reduced glutathione with Vitamin C for cellular vitality

key_ingredients.name: Reduced Glutathione (L-GSH)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Master cellular antioxidant; detoxification enzyme cofactor; immune modulation

key_ingredients.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Glutathione recycling; collagen synthesis; immune stimulation

key_ingredients.name: Alpha Lipoic Acid

products.name: S-BALANCE
products.tagline: Gut microbiome rebalancing formula with probiotics and digestive enzymes

key_ingredients.name: Lactobacillus acidophilus
key_ingredients.mechanism: Competitive exclusion of pathogens; lactase production; gut barrier integrity

products.name: V-DAILY

key_ingredients.name: Zinc Bisglycinate

products.name: VITALAGE COLLAGEN

key_ingredients.name: Resveratrol

products.name: V-OMEGA 3
products.tagline: High-potency EPA/DHA fish oil for cardiovascular, brain, and joint health

key_ingredients.name: EPA (Eicosapentaenoic Acid)

key_ingredients.name: DHA (Docosahexaenoic Acid)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Neuronal membrane fluidity; synaptic plasticity; retinal health

key_ingredients.name: Vitamin E (Tocopherol)

products.name: V-CURCUMAX
products.tagline: Enhanced bioavailability curcumin with piperine for inflammation and joint health

key_ingredients.name: Curcumin (95% Curcuminoids)
key_ingredients.mechanism: NF-kB inhibition; COX-2 suppression; antioxidant; neuroprotective

key_ingredients.name: Piperine (BioPerine)
key_ingredients.mechanism: CYP3A4 inhibition; increases curcumin bioavailability by 2000%

key_ingredients.name: MSM (Methylsulfonylmethane)
key_ingredients.mechanism: Sulfur donation for collagen and cartilage synthesis; anti-inflammatory

products.safety_profile: Well-tolerated; piperine may interact with certain medications (CYP3A4 substrates)

products.name: VITALPRO
products.tagline: Complete protein nutrition blend for muscle, recovery, and daily vitality

key_ingredients.name: Whey Protein Isolate
key_ingredients.mechanism: Complete amino acid profile; rapid absorption; mTOR activation for muscle protein synthesis

key_ingredients.name: Leucine
key_ingredients.mechanism: mTORC1 activation; muscle protein synthesis initiation

key_ingredients.name: Digestive Enzymes
key_ingredients.mechanism: Protein digestion optimization; reduced GI discomfort from protein intake

products.safety_profile: Well-tolerated; dairy-derived (lactose intolerance caution)
products.dosing: 1 scoop (30g) in water or milk post-workout or as meal supplement

products.name: NOURISH+
products.tagline: Superfood nutrition blend for holistic well-being and micronutrient density

key_ingredients.name: Spirulina
key_ingredients.mechanism: Complete protein; phycocyanin antioxidant; immune modulation; iron source

products.name: V-ITALAY

products.name: V-ITALBOOST

products.name: V-NITRO

products.name: V-CONTROL
